title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - February 6, 2024
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - February 6, 2024
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - February 6, 2024
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-02-06_202426dry_img_dryreporttop_3a0450e72b44.png
· Chinese New Year sees Capesize spot rates at 15-year highs - As the celebrations for the Year of the Dragon are underway in China, Capesize owners have their own milestone to celebrate, with Capesize spot rates at 15-year highs for this time of the year , a period that traditionally had marked the low point for any given year. The Atlantic market remains the main driver of such an astonishing yet surprising performance, while the reasons behind the current strength all point to inadequate vessel supply in the western hemisphere. Although statistics show a trivial impact from the current Red Sea disruption when it comes to dry bulk, it seems that ballasting tonnage has indeed been dislocated (at a time when also the Panama Canal draught is affecting vessel supply), leading to the now months' long vessel shortage in that part of the world.
